name: Gmail pull
description: Read-only Gmail ingestion through the connection broker (issue #304): messages land in the staging band as social.message rows, incremental via Gmail's historyId cursor.
prompt: Every half hour, pull new Gmail messages into the vault. First run pulls the last 30 days; after that, follow the history cursor incrementally. Read-only — never send, never modify. Stage everything for my review unless I set the connection to auto-publish.

vault.why: Stages Gmail messages into the vault's review band and tracks the incremental history cursor on the pull.gmail connection.
